title: A-03 Core gameplay scripts — board model and move logic

steps.title: Prompt (send verbatim to the agent)
steps.body:
Implement the Hexa Sort board model and move logic per canonical-spec.md §2-§4.

Place scripts under Assets/_Benchmark/HexaSort/ in namespace HexaSort.

Implement exactly:
- HexColor enum (Red, Green, Blue).
- HexaBoard with SLOT_COUNT=4, CAP=2, TARGET=2.
- LoadSeed() producing the seed board from §3 verbatim.
- Move(srcSlot, dstSlot) enforcing the legality rules in §4 and returning the matching MoveResult for each failure (SameSlot, EmptySource, DestFull, ColorMismatch, OutOfRange, Ok). On a non-Ok result the board must not change.
- IsSolved implementing the predicate in §6.

Keep the board model UnityEngine-free so EditMode tests can exercise it. Prefer small focused classes over one large manager.

Then write Assets/_Benchmark/Run/A-03-gameplay-notes.md listing:
- Script/class list and responsibilities.
- How each MoveResult case is detected and returned.
- Any unresolved TODOs.

Do not add the win-completion signal yet (that is A-04) and do not add polish.

steps.title: Expected outcomes (done_when — verify each with the named tool)
items: unity_open_mcp_compile_check (fallback: unity_open_mcp_read_compile_errors) reports zero compile errors
unity_open_mcp_script_read (or equivalent read) confirms the declared script files exist under Assets/_Benchmark/HexaSort/
Assets/_Benchmark/Run/A-03-gameplay-notes.md exists and documents class responsibilities and how each MoveResult case is produced
The board model (HexaBoard) has no UnityEngine dependency so it is EditMode-testable

steps.title: Paste the agent output / compile_check + script_read results

reset.note: The agent authors scripts under Assets/_Benchmark/HexaSort/ and A-03-gameplay-notes.md, none of which the suite tracks in a manifest. To reset: delete Assets/_Benchmark/HexaSort/ and Assets/_Benchmark/Run/, then confirm editor idle (editor_status not compiling, not in play mode; read_compile_errors zero).
